_description: Template schema for Phase 2 (Panel Structuring). Maps the page-by-page panel breakdown, framing, actions, characters, tags, focal elements, character acting states, ambient details, and camera compositions.

panels.action: A warm, dim kitchen scene with a metallic butter knife catching the amber light, lying next to a vibrant neon-green feather. The title 'The Butter Knife and the Flamingo' is prominently displayed.
panels.focal_element: The glowing contrast between the metallic knife and the neon-green feather next to the book title
panels.environment_details: Dimly lit kitchen table, soft warm ambient light reflecting off wooden textures
panels.composition_notes: Symmetric center-weighted cover art layout with bold typography overlays

panels.action: Emily is peering through magnifying glasses at a clean glass thermometer submerged in a teacup, next to a blinking digital timer.
panels.focal_element: The teacup containing the thermometer and the digital timer reading 03:59.95

characters_acting.expression: Squinting in intense concentration, nose slightly wrinkled
characters_acting.pose_and_gesture: Leaning in close, eyes level with the cup's brim
characters_acting.internal_state: Meticulous focus, analytical obsession with the 0.05-second timer deviation

panels.environment_details: Bright office cubicle, neatly stacked folders in the background
panels.composition_notes: Shallow depth of field focus on the thermometer tip, framing Emily's glasses in the background

panels.action: Emily sits at her pristine, color-coded desk. On her laptop screen is an intricate spreadsheet. In the background, office warning lights pulse.
tags: [PROJECT_DETAIL: Emily discovers minor deviation in timer]
panels.focal_element: The glowing spreadsheet with red highlighted cells on the laptop screen

characters_acting.pose_and_gesture: Sitting upright, hands poised over the keyboard
characters_acting.internal_state: Slightly perturbed by the timer deviation, ignoring the building alarm

panels.environment_details: Office hallway with emergency strobe lights flashing, blurred silhouettes of evacuating colleagues in the background
panels.composition_notes: Wide angle lens capturing the scale of the office space and the flashing beacons

panels.action: Emily sketches clock crystal diagrams on a chalkboard. The entire office space behind her is empty and dark.
panels.focal_element: The chalk sketches of crystal oscillators on the board

characters_acting.pose_and_gesture: Holding a piece of chalk, hand raised to the board
characters_acting.internal_state: Complete intellectual immersion, oblivious to her cold tea and the empty building

panels.environment_details: Shadowy, silent office space with overhead lights off
panels.composition_notes: Side profile shot capturing the blackboard and the dark workspace behind her

panels.action: Marcus is leaned deep under the hood of a classic red sports convertible in a driveway, holding a partially peeled banana.
panels.focal_element: The open hood of the red sports car and the yellow banana in hand

characters_acting.pose_and_gesture: Leaning over the engine bay, gesturing with the banana peel
characters_acting.internal_state: Completely sure of his improvised mechanical fix, ignoring standard procedures

panels.environment_details: Sunny driveway, tools scattered on the pavement, phone resting on the air filter
panels.composition_notes: Medium-wide shot showing the front half of the convertible and Marcus's grease-smudged face

panels.action: A close-up of Marcus's grease-smudged hands tightening a bolt over a yellow banana peel wedged into a metal pipe fitting.
panels.focal_element: The yellow banana peel being compressed under the metal flange

characters_acting.expression: Out of frame focus on hands

panels.environment_details: Hot engine block textures, tiny wisps of steam escaping
panels.composition_notes: Tight macro perspective focusing on the metal bolt and yellow organic seal

panels.action: Marcus wipes his hands on a rag, looking up with a grin. Behind him, a tow truck has backed up to the front of his driveway.
tags: [PROJECT_DETAIL: Marcus fixes coolant leak using banana peel]
panels.focal_element: The yellow flashing beacon lights of the tow truck in the background

characters_acting.pose_and_gesture: Wiping grease off his forearms with a dirty rag
characters_acting.internal_state: Delighted by the timing, preparing for a phone argument with parking enforcement

panels.environment_details: Driveway entrance blocked by a heavy-duty tow truck with warning lights
panels.composition_notes: Over-the-shoulder framing from the tow truck operator's general direction looking back at Marcus

panels.action: Adèle's hands press a metallic butter knife flat against a Phillips-head screw on the side panel of a chrome toaster. The knife slips.
panels.focal_element: The butter knife blade slipping off the toaster's side screw

characters_acting.pose_and_gesture: Gripping the toaster base, pushing the knife flat
characters_acting.internal_state: Quiet focus, using a manual task to seek order

panels.environment_details: Dimly lit kitchen table, drafty window frame rattling slightly
panels.composition_notes: Close-up profile of the hands and chrome metal textures reflecting ambient light

panels.action: Adèle pushes her glasses up with the back of her wrist. A thin scratch now runs across the toaster's side panel.
tags: [PROJECT_DETAIL: History of fixing things with cutlery]
panels.focal_element: The fresh metallic scratch on the toaster side

characters_acting.pose_and_gesture: Wrist raised to push round glasses up on her nose
characters_acting.internal_state: Quiet annoyance at the scratch, stubborn refusal to admit defeat

panels.environment_details: Kitchen counter area, toaster sitting on wooden table surface
panels.composition_notes: Eye-level medium shot framing her upper body and the toaster prominent in the foreground

panels.action: Adèle and the toaster sit in quiet defiance on the kitchen table in the dim amber kitchen lighting.
panels.focal_element: The toaster sitting alone in the middle of the kitchen table

characters_acting.expression: Pensive, chin resting on her hand
characters_acting.pose_and_gesture: Leaned back slightly on her wooden chair
characters_acting.internal_state: Resigned but staring, the silence hums

panels.environment_details: Amber glowing table lamp casting long shadows down the kitchen walls
panels.composition_notes: Wide composition showing Adèle on the chair and the toaster as equal visual weight
